name: DaVinci Artiq Vaporizer
summary: A 510 cartridge vaporiser with an extended cooling airpath and three heat modes, for patients prescribed oil cartridges.
description: The DaVinci Artiq is built for 510-threaded oil cartridges, with an extended airpath that cools vapour noticeably before it reaches you, which helps if harsh draws are a problem. Three voltage-based heat modes (1.8v to 3.6v) let you tailor temperature and draw to the cartridge you're using, and the airflow cartridges manage heat and draw resistance. USB-C charging, anodised aluminium body, and a clean, simple design. It is specifically a cartridge device, not a dry-herb vaporiser, so it suits patients prescribed oil cartridges who want a cooler, smoother draw. Backed by a 1-year warranty.
